en: Z is the last letter of the alphabet
So what does it mean to catch some Z's Let's find out
ko: 그럼 catch some Z's는 무슨 뜻일까? 알아보자

en: What time did you go to bed last night Too late I practiced my accordion all night
ko: 어젯밤 몇 시에 잤어? 너무 늦게. 밤새 아코디언 연습했어

en: Well we have a lot of work to do today Just let me catch some Z's at my desk That's
ko: 오늘 할 일이 많은데. 책상에서 잠깐 눈 좀 붙이게 해줘. 그건

en: not a good idea You're right I'll go into the recording studio
ko: 안 좋은 생각이야. 맞아, 녹음실로 갈게

en: To catch some Z's means to sleep
ko: catch some Z's는 잠을 자다라는 뜻이야

en: Some people snore when they sleep So this term comes from the buzzing sound of
ko: 어떤 사람들은 잘 때 코를 골아. 그래서 이 표현은 코고는 소리의

en: Comics and even emojis use Z's to represent sleep And that's
ko: 만화나 이모지에서도 Z를 써서 수면을 나타내지. 이상
